translations.en: a short, barrel-chested man.
translations.zh: 一位身材矮小、胸廓寬闊的男子。

translations.en: "A good $T to thee, Avatar."
"Anything else can I do for thee?"
translations.zh: 「還有什麼吾能為汝效勞的嗎？」

translations.en: "I am Dale the @Glassblower."
"I make @glassware, the finest in the land!"
translations.zh: 「吾製作@glassware（玻璃）器皿，全境最精良的！」

translations.en: "If you'd like to @buy some of my glassware, just say the word!"
translations.zh: 「若汝想@buy（買）吾的玻璃器皿，開口就是了！」

translations.en: "Aye, I know how to make glass swords."
translations.zh: 「是的，吾知道如何製作玻璃劍。」

translations.en: "But there is little @demand for them."
"I require five gems for the crafting. This is too expensive for most."
translations.zh: 「製作需要五顆寶石。對大多數人來說太貴了。」

translations.en: "Aye, but things of @beauty they are..."
translations.zh: 「是的，但它們確實是@beauty（美麗）的東西……」

translations.en: "Thou seemst like a person who appreciates art."
translations.zh: 「汝看起來是個懂得欣賞藝術的人。」

translations.en: "I'll make thee one, if thou hast the @gems."
translations.zh: 「若汝有@gems（寶石），吾可以為汝打造一把。」

translations.en: "Hmmm...You'd have to see a lensmaker about that."
translations.zh: 「嗯……汝得去找鏡片師詢問那件事。」

translations.en: "I hear there's one near the Lycaeum."
"Come to my shop when it's open!"
"Come to my shop when it's open!"
"Aye, a glass sword needs fine gems to complete its beauty!"
translations.zh: 「是的，玻璃劍需要上等寶石來成就其美感！」

translations.en: "A fine $T to thee!"
"Sorry?"
"Sorry, $Y, you haven't enough gems."
"Aye, $Y, I see the gems you carry."
"Dost thou wish me to craft thee a glass sword?"
translations.zh: 「汝是否希望吾為汝打造一把玻璃劍？」

translations.en: "It will cost thee 5 gems! Art thou certain?"
"Hmm," he scowls, "perhaps I was mistaken about thee..."
translations.zh: 「嗯，」他皺眉道，「或許吾看錯汝了……」

translations.en: "But thou cannot carry such a sword!"
$N turns to the furnace and begins crafting the sword.
translations.zh: $N 轉向熔爐，開始鍛造這把劍。

translations.en: Soon it is finished, and you marvel at its beauty!
translations.zh: 不久後大功告成，汝對其美感嘆不已！

translations.en: "There she is, and a finer work thou'lt never see!"
translations.zh: 「大功告成，汝永遠見不到比這更精美的作品了！」

translations.en: "Hmm," he scowls, "perhaps I was mistaken about thee..."
translations.zh: 「嗯，」他皺眉道，「或許吾看錯汝了……」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
"Which item?"
"That $1 costs #1 gold."
"Interested, $Y?"
"But 'twould make thee o'erburdened, $Y!"
"Excellent!"
After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the $1.
translations.zh: 收下 $Y 的金幣後，$N 遞出 $1。

translations.en: "But thou hast not enough gold, $Y!"
Glass
Jar
Mirror

translator_notes: 戴爾是密諾克的玻璃工匠，可製作玻璃劍（需 5 顆寶石），也出售玻璃、罐子、鏡子。知道學苑附近有鏡片師（暗示 Ephemerides 的望遠鏡任務）。
